atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports episodes of chest pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing chest discomfort while performing yard work during a hot weekend.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports shortness of breath accompanying chest pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports chest pain lasting approximately one hour.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies other symptoms since the ER visit.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has no history of knee surgery or rehabilitation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no chest pain during physical therapy exercises.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a history of high blood pressure.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's blood pressure is elevated at 160/95 mmHg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The echocardiogram reveals a mild low pumping function of the heart.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A three out of six systolic ejection murmur is heard.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has an episode of chest pain, likely related to severe hypertension or underlying heart disease.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes carvedilol at 25 mg twice daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes lisinopril at 10 mg daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A follow-up appointment is scheduled in four weeks.
